user.title: Tuya OpenAPI Credentials
user.description: Enter your Tuya cloud project Access ID and Access Secret. Find them at https://iot.tuya.com → your cloud project → Overview.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Enter comma-separated Device IDs. Find them in the Tuya app or developer console.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials — check your Access ID and Access Secret.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Tuya API. Check your internet connection and API host.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
error.device_ids_required: Please enter at least one Device ID.
